title: Factory and mock APIs must come from downloaded driver source
symptoms: Factory calls driver constructor with wrong keyword
Mock lacks a public method used by task
Device smoke test passes scan but runtime task fails
wrong_pattern: Guessing driver constructor or method names from package name only.
correct_pattern: Read driver .py, README, and example before writing factory/mock.
fix_guidance: Extract main driver class from source.
Use README/example for default I2C address and constructor shape.
Mock every public method used by generated tasks.
